panels.description: Close up of protagonist's face, eyes closed in deep sorrow, ethereal silhouette of Henry in the background, dramatic shadows, soft melancholic lighting.

bubbles.text: Your spirit still visits and consoles your unhappy friend. Pardon this gush of sorrow.

panels.description: Wide landscape shot of a ship approaching the white cliffs of Dover on a clear, cold December morning. The ocean is calm, perspective looking towards the distant English coast.

bubbles.text: It was on a clear morning that I first saw the white cliffs of Britain.

panels.description: Wide panning shot of the Thames river entering London. St. Paul's Cathedral and the Tower of London visible against the skyline. Historical atmosphere.

bubbles.text: At length we saw the numerous steeples of London... and the Tower famed in history.

panels.description: Medium shot of Henry in a crowded London street, looking detached and weary. Clerval is in the background, interacting with local intellectuals, looking vibrant and curious.

bubbles.text: But a blight had come over my existence.

panels.description: Medium close up of Henry holding a map or scientific letter, eyes set with grim determination, while in the blurry background Clerval reads books on India with an enthusiastic expression.

bubbles.text: I now began to collect the materials for my new creation.
